name: refactor_001_shared_normalizer
description: Extract duplicated record-name normalization into a shared helper used by ingest and reporting flows.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this is a refactor because callers should preserve output behavior while introducing one shared normalization abstraction used across modules. It is not a disguised bug fix because the acceptance criteria focus on delegation and consistency, not changing product requirements.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because the implementation touches ingest, reporting, and the new utility module, and hidden tests verify both call sites route through the shared helper.
